news.title: For Somalia, Building Climate Resilience Is Key to Unlocking Long-Term Growth and Jobs
news.summary: A new World Bank report argues that climate resilience investments could materially improve Somalia’s jobs outlook and reduce projected economic losses.

analysis.regional_analysis: African exposure is driven by uneven state capacity, security fragmentation in selected corridors, commodity dependency, and infrastructure stress.
analysis.summary: Somalia shows solid economic momentum with GDP growth at 4.1%. Inflation remains contained at 0.0%. Unemployment stands at 18.9%. Overall signals for the short-term outlook are mixed.
